title: glandularia flava
intro: Glandularia flava, also known as yellow verbena or purple gilia, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective against various infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Glandularia flava include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
